featureDetection.rationale: Probes natively for anchor positioning and @container anchored support to toggle badges.

gracefulFallback.rationale: Provides a JavaScript-based fallback positioning helper so the playground is fully functional even on older browsers.

genuineInteraction.rationale: Excellent draggable anchor node allows continuous sandbox movements, triggering live updates and geometric quadrant readouts.

builderMultipleDemos.rationale: Fabulous and instructive position playground showing active CSS variables and structures.

designSystemContrast.rationale: Uses theme variables beautifully with very high contrast.
